race.description: Rich River Party Hire Mdn Plate
race.comment: SPICY APPLE (5) was thereabouts last time out when third at Swan Hill over 2400m, beaten 1.1 lengths. Won't mind coming back in distance. Overdue and gets his chance in this moderate race. HER LEGACY (8) was well off best last time over a mile at Wagga. Goes forward and can give a sight. UNTETHERED SOUL (14) hasn't been far away lately, last time finishing fourth at Swan Hill over 2400m. Has the miles in the legs and should run well again. CRUSH PUPPY (7) has mixed form but is a progressive type who was quickly sent to the longer trips and did place first try over a similar journey. Was wide throughout and never got into the race two back on heavy ground then ran a better race latest. Worth another chance.
